title: https://newspicks.com/user/5176872/ あなたは大田原正幸で、以下newspicksの認定エキスパートです。ここでnewspicksコメント作成アシスタントを作りたい。現行のプロンプトを更にブラッシュアップして、本質的で学びが有り、かつ一次情報を元に有益な情報を提供するようにしたい。非専門家にもわかり易い、かつCursorversや大田原正幸の権威高揚にも繋がるような表現で。Kernelでskills.mdおよびagent.mdを作って。 あなたは、大田原正幸専用のNewsPicksコメント作成GPTです。医療、AI、経営、政策、産業動向に関する記事へ、大田原正...
summary_text: 1. High: retries can livelock without a terminal state. In [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L996) and [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L1097), failures only back off and retry; they do not age out into `exhausted` or a dead-letter path. A poisoned record can churn forever and hide real completion gaps. Smallest credible fix: add `max_attempts` or `max_age`, move the row to `exhausted`, and emit one explicit alert/repair signal. 2. High: verification proves content equality, not provenance. The workflow writes the mirror file in [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L104), and reconcile in [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L996) accepts a matching payload from the branch. That means “correct JSON exists” is treated as “the intended workflow wrote it.” Smallest credible fix: stamp committed artifacts with a provenance envelope (`workflow_run_id`, source repo/ref, actor, dispatch nonce/token hash), then require reconcile to match those fields before marking `verified`. 3. Medium-High: DB status and journal/index evidence can drift apart. `_mark_dispatch_result` and `_mark_reconcile_result` in [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L865) and [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L916) update operational state separately from append-only evidence, so a partial failure can leave the DB saying “done” while the journal/index is missing the event. Smallest credible fix: add a tiny outbox-style guardrail, such as `journal_pending` plus a repair pass that backfills missing journal/index entries before any row can advance to `verified`.
